name: 蹦蹦
note:
<Use Undertale Attack>
<UTB Mode: 0>
<UTB Duration: 900>

<UTB Initial Code>
this.window.width = 300;
this.window.height = 250;
this.window.x = (Graphics.width / 2) - (this.window.width / 2);
</UTB Initial Code>

<UTB Code>
// 每 110 幀生成一堵帶有隨機缺口的巨大銅礦牆
if (f % 110 === 0) {
    var gapPosition = Math.randomInt(3); // 0: 缺口在上, 1: 缺口在中, 2: 缺口在下
    
    var wallTop = this.createAttack(1);
    var wallBottom = this.createAttack(2);
    
    // 根據缺口位置調整上下牆壁的 Y 座標
    if (gapPosition === 0) {
        wallTop.y = this.window.top - 100;
        wallBottom.y = this.window.bottom - 50;
    } else if (gapPosition === 1) {
        wallTop.y = this.window.top + 20;
        wallBottom.y = this.window.bottom - 20;
    } else {
        wallTop.y = this.window.top + 50;
        wallBottom.y = this.window.bottom + 100;
    }
}
</UTB Code>

<UTB Attack 1>
Initial X: this.window.right + 40
Initial Y: this.window.top
Collision Type: rect
Width: 50
Height: 180
X Speed: -3
Y Speed: 0
Color: #B87333
</UTB Attack 1>

<UTB Attack 2>
Initial X: this.window.right + 40
Initial Y: this.window.bottom
Collision Type: rect
Width: 50
Height: 180
X Speed: -3
Y Speed: 0
Color: #B87333
</UTB Attack 2>

// 兩側射出不可擊破的干擾小碎石

    smallRock.y = this.window.top + 20 + Math.randomInt(this.window.height - 40);
}

name: 測試攻擊
note:
<Use Undertale Attack>
<UTB Duration: 600>

<UTB Initial Code>
// 動態放大這招的戰鬥框！
this.window.width = 300;  // 寬度變 400
this.window.height = 250; // 高度變 300
// 讓框框重新在畫面正中央對齊
this.window.x = (Graphics.boxWidth / 2) - (this.window.width / 2);
this.window.y -= 120; // 稍微往上移一點，避免擋到下方的血條
</UTB Initial Code>

<UTB Code>
// f = 當前幀數, p = 玩家物件

// 【階段一】：隨機雷射網 (0 ~ 240幀)
if (f < 240 && f % 45 === 0) {
    var atkV = this.createAttack(2);
    atkV.x = this.window.left + 20 + Math.randomInt(this.window.width - 40);
    
    var atkH = this.createAttack(1);
    atkH.y = this.window.top + 20 + Math.randomInt(this.window.height - 40);
}

// 【階段二】：精準狙擊與追蹤彈 (240 ~ 420幀)
if (f >= 240 && f < 420) {
    if (f % 35 === 0) {
        var atkAim = this.createAttack(Math.randomInt(2) + 1);
        atkAim.x = p.x;
        atkAim.y = p.y;
    }
    if (f % 60 === 0) {
        var atkTrack = this.createAttack(3);
        atkTrack.x = this.window.x_middle;
        atkTrack.y = this.window.top + 20;
    }
}

// 【階段三】：巨大十字封鎖 + 橘色流星雨 (420 ~ 600幀)
if (f === 420) {
    var bigH = this.createAttack(1);
    bigH.height = this.window.height - 80;
    bigH.width = 1000; // 加長以覆蓋大畫面
    bigH.warningTime = 90;
    
    var bigV = this.createAttack(2);
    bigV.width = this.window.width - 80;
    bigV.height = 1000; // 加長以覆蓋大畫面
    bigV.warningTime = 90; 
}
if (f > 480 && f % 8 === 0) {
    var drop = this.createAttack(4);
    drop.x = this.window.left + Math.randomInt(this.window.width);
    drop.y = this.window.top - 10;
}
</UTB Code>

<UTB Attack 1>
Initial X: this.window.x_middle
Initial Y: this.window.y_middle
Collision Type: Rect
Width: 800
Height: 20
Warning: 45
Color: red
<Direct Code>
if (this.frame > 60) this.delete();
</Direct Code>
</UTB Attack 1>

<UTB Attack 2>
Initial X: this.window.x_middle
Initial Y: this.window.y_middle
Collision Type: Rect
Width: 20
Height: 800
Warning: 45
Color: red
<Direct Code>
if (this.frame > 60) this.delete();
</Direct Code>
</UTB Attack 2>

<UTB Attack 3>
Initial X: this.window.x_middle
Initial Y: this.window.top
Collision Type: circle
Radius: 8
Color: purple
<Direct Code>
if (this.frame % 5 === 0) {
    if (this.x < this._player.x) this.xspeed += 0.2;
    else this.xspeed -= 0.2;
    if (this.y < this._player.y) this.yspeed += 0.2;
    else this.yspeed -= 0.2;
    
    if (this.xspeed > 2.5) this.xspeed = 2.5;
    if (this.xspeed < -2.5) this.xspeed = -2.5;
    if (this.yspeed > 2.5) this.yspeed = 2.5;
    if (this.yspeed < -2.5) this.yspeed = -2.5;
}
</Direct Code>
</UTB Attack 3>

<UTB Attack 4>
Initial X: this.window.x_middle
Initial Y: this.window.top
Collision Type: circle
Radius: 6
Y Speed: 4
Color: orange
</UTB Attack 4>

}

if (!this._init) {
  this._init = true;
  const q = $gameTemp._q6 || [];
  const cfg = q.shift() || {};
  if (cfg.b) {
    this.y = this.window.bottom;
    this._exitUp = true;
  }
}
this._age = (this._age || 0) + 1;
this._mywidth = 0;
this._myheight = 0;
this.opacity = this._age < 8 ? this._age * 30 : Math.max(0, 240 - (this._age - 8) * 14);
if (this._age > 24) this.yspeed = this._exitUp ? -9999 : 9999;
</Direct Code>
</UTB Attack 6>

name: 另一個技能
note:
<Use Undertale Attack>
<UTB Mode: 1>
<UTB Duration: 600>
<UTB Sprite: blueheart>

<UTB Code>
// f = 當前幀數

// 【階段一】：基礎跨欄跑酷 (0 ~ 180幀)
if (f < 180 && f % 50 === 0) {
    this.createAttack(1); // 生成小障礙物
}

// 【階段二】：高低差考驗 (180 ~ 390幀) - 藍色攻擊已移除！
if (f >= 180 && f < 390 && f % 45 === 0) {
    var rand = Math.randomInt(2);
    if (rand === 0) {
        this.createAttack(1); // 1/2 機率出小障礙
    } else {
        this.createAttack(2); // 1/2 機率出高障礙 (需要長按跳躍)
    }
}

// 【階段三】：極限干擾：跨欄 + 天降子彈 (390 ~ 600幀)
if (f >= 390) {
    // 地板繼續出障礙
    if (f % 45 === 0) {
        var rand2 = Math.randomInt(2);
        if (rand2 === 0) this.createAttack(1);
        else this.createAttack(2);
    }
    // 天花板掉落子彈
    if (f % 20 === 0) {
        var drop = this.createAttack(3);
        drop.x = this.window.left + 15 + Math.randomInt(this.window.width - 30);
    }
}
</UTB Code>

<UTB Attack 1>

Initial Y: this.window.bottom - 20

name: 石頭
note:
<Use Undertale Attack>
<UTB Mode: 0>
<UTB Duration: 900>

<UTB Initial Code>
// 戰鬥框維持較大尺寸，容納龐大的攻擊
this.window.width = 320;
this.window.height = 250;
this.window.x = (Graphics.width / 2) - (this.window.width / 2);

// 建立追蹤器變數，用來記錄當前場上的巨木與礦石
this._activeWood = null;
this._activeOre = null;
</UTB Initial Code>

<UTB Code>
// 檢查巨木是否還在場上：變數有值 且 尚未被系統標記刪除 且 還存在於敵人陣列中
var woodAlive = this._activeWood && !this._activeWood._needsToBeDeleted && this._enemies.includes(this._activeWood);

// 【古木橫掃】：每 95 幀觸發，但必須「場上沒有木頭 (!woodAlive)」才允許生成
if (f % 95 === 0 && !woodAlive) {
    this._activeWood = this.createAttack(1); // 將生成的攻擊存入追蹤器
    this._activeWood.y = this.window.top + 30 + Math.randomInt(this.window.height - 60);
    
    // 一半機率改從左邊生成並往右飛
    if (Math.randomInt(2) === 0) {
        this._activeWood.x = this.window.left - 50;
        this._activeWood.xspeed = 2.5; 
    }
}

// 檢查礦石是否還在場上
var oreAlive = this._activeOre && !this._activeOre._needsToBeDeleted && this._enemies.includes(this._activeOre);

// 【巨型銅礦砸地】：每 130 幀觸發，同樣必須「場上沒有礦石 (!oreAlive)」才允許生成
if (f > 60 && f % 130 === 0 && !oreAlive) {
    this._activeOre = this.createAttack(2); // 將生成的攻擊存入追蹤器
    this._activeOre.x = this.window.x + 40 + Math.randomInt(this.window.width - 80);
    this._activeOre.xspeed = -2 + Math.randomInt(5);
}

// 【礦石碎屑】：(維持不變，持續干擾)
if (f % 20 === 0) {
    var dir = Math.randomInt(2); 
    if (dir === 0) {
        var shard1 = this.createAttack(3);
        shard1.y = this.window.top + Math.randomInt(this.window.height);
        shard1.yspeed = -2 + Math.randomInt(5);
    } else {
        var shard2 = this.createAttack(4);
        shard2.y = this.window.top + Math.randomInt(this.window.height);
        shard2.yspeed = -2 + Math.randomInt(5);
    }
}
</UTB Code>

note:
<Use Undertale Attack>
<UTB Mode: 0>
<UTB Duration: 900>

<UTB Initial Code>
this.window.width = 300;
this.window.height = 250;
this.window.x = (Graphics.width / 2) - (this.window.width / 2);
</UTB Initial Code>

<UTB Code>
// 每 110 幀生成一堵帶有隨機缺口的巨大銅礦牆
if (f % 110 === 0) {
    var gapPosition = Math.randomInt(3); // 0: 缺口在上, 1: 缺口在中, 2: 缺口在下
    
    var wallTop = this.createAttack(1);
    var wallBottom = this.createAttack(2);
    
    // 根據缺口位置調整上下牆壁的 Y 座標
    if (gapPosition === 0) {
        wallTop.y = this.window.top - 100;
        wallBottom.y = this.window.bottom - 50;
    } else if (gapPosition === 1) {
        wallTop.y = this.window.top + 20;
        wallBottom.y = this.window.bottom - 20;
    } else {
        wallTop.y = this.window.top + 50;
        wallBottom.y = this.window.bottom + 100;
    }
}
</UTB Code>

<UTB Attack 1>
Initial X: this.window.right + 40
Initial Y: this.window.top
Collision Type: rect
Width: 50
Height: 180
X Speed: -3
Y Speed: 0
Color: #B87333
</UTB Attack 1>

<UTB Attack 2>
Initial X: this.window.right + 40
Initial Y: this.window.bottom
Collision Type: rect
Width: 50
Height: 180
X Speed: -3
Y Speed: 0
Color: #B87333
</UTB Attack 2>

<UTB Code>
// 掉落可擊破的大塊隕石
if (f % 40 === 0) {
    var meteor = this.createAttack(1);
    meteor.x = this.window.x + Math.randomInt(this.window.width);
}

// 兩側射出不可擊破的干擾小碎石
if (f % 20 === 0) {
    var smallRock = this.createAttack(2);
    smallRock.y = this.window.top + 20 + Math.randomInt(this.window.height - 40);
}
</UTB Code>

// 保持框框置中

// 2. 降低頻率：每 50 幀才隨機從 1~4 中挑選一個方向發射一顆石頭

    this.createAttack(direction);
}

note:
<Use Undertale Attack>
<UTB Mode: 0>
<UTB Duration: 900>

<UTB Initial Code>
// 戰鬥框維持較大尺寸，容納龐大的攻擊
this.window.width = 320;
this.window.height = 250;
this.window.x = (Graphics.width / 2) - (this.window.width / 2);
</UTB Initial Code>

<UTB Code>
// 【古木橫掃】：每 95 幀隨機從左邊或右邊推進，打破固定節奏
if (f % 95 === 0) {
    var wood = this.createAttack(1);
    wood.y = this.window.top + 30 + Math.randomInt(this.window.height - 60);
    
    // 一半機率改從左邊生成並往右飛
    if (Math.randomInt(2) === 0) {
        wood.x = this.window.left - 50;
        wood.xspeed = 2.5; 
    }
}

// 【巨型銅礦砸地】：每 130 幀掉落，加上隨機的左右偏移，讓落點無法輕易預測
if (f > 60 && f % 130 === 0) {
    var ore = this.createAttack(2);
    ore.x = this.window.x + 40 + Math.randomInt(this.window.width - 80);
    ore.xspeed = -2 + Math.randomInt(5); // 產生 -2 到 +2 的隨機水平偏移
}

// 【礦石碎屑】：每 20 幀射出，改為單邊交替，並加上隨機的上下斜角飛行
if (f % 20 === 0) {
    var dir = Math.randomInt(2); 
    if (dir === 0) {
        var shard1 = this.createAttack(3); // 從左往右飛
        shard1.y = this.window.top + Math.randomInt(this.window.height);
        shard1.yspeed = -2 + Math.randomInt(5); // 產生 -2 到 +2 的隨機垂直偏移
    } else {
        var shard2 = this.createAttack(4); // 從右往左飛
        shard2.y = this.window.top + Math.randomInt(this.window.height);
        shard2.yspeed = -2 + Math.randomInt(5); // 產生 -2 到 +2 的隨機垂直偏移
    }
}
</UTB Code>

Initial Y: this.window.top - 10
Collision Type: circle
Radius: 8
X Speed: 0
Y Speed: 2
Color: #32CD32
<Direct Code>
// 【幻術邏輯】：控制透明度 (Opacity)
// 30~70 幀時，毒刺隱身融入背景
if (this.frame > 30 && this.frame < 70) {
    this.opacity -= 10; 
    if(this.opacity < 0) this.opacity = 0;
} 
// 70 幀之後，解除隱身，並且突然加速突襲！
else if (this.frame >= 70) {
    this.opacity += 20; 
    if(this.opacity > 255) this.opacity = 255;
    this.yspeed = 5; 
}
</Direct Code>
</UTB Attack 1>

name: 哥哥
note:
<Use Undertale Attack>
<UTB Mode: 0>
<UTB Duration: 1000>

<UTB Initial Code>
// 準備一個正方形的場地，最適合展現全方位的爆發彈幕
this.window.width = 250;
this.window.height = 250;
this.window.x = (Graphics.width / 2) - (this.window.width / 2);
</UTB Initial Code>

<UTB Code>
// 【魅惑爆發】：每 210 幀 (3.5秒) 觸發一次
if (f > 0 && f % 210 === 0) {
    // 判斷當前是第幾次爆發，單數次 4 方位，雙數次 8 方位
    var cycle = Math.floor(f / 210);
    var ways = (cycle % 2 !== 0) ? 4 : 8; 
    
    for (var i = 0; i < ways; i++) {
        var charm = this.createAttack(1);
        // 從場地正中央爆發
        charm.x = this.window.x_middle;
        charm.y = this.window.y_middle;
        
        // 計算發射角度
        var angle = (Math.PI * 2 / ways) * i;
        
        // 如果是 4 方位，稍微旋轉 45 度 (變成 X 型) 會比十字型更難躲
        if (ways === 4) {
            angle += Math.PI / 4; 
        }
        
        // 賦予 x 與 y 方向的爆發速度
        charm.xspeed = Math.cos(angle) * 4.5;
        charm.yspeed = Math.sin(angle) * 4.5;
    }
}

// 【飄落花瓣】：每 35 幀生成一片會左右飄動的粉色小花瓣干擾
if (f % 35 === 0) {
    var petal = this.createAttack(2);
    petal.x = this.window.x + Math.randomInt(this.window.width);
}
</UTB Code>

<UTB Attack 1>

Radius: 12

</UTB Attack 1>

<UTB Attack 2>

// 利用 sin 函數讓花瓣產生左右搖曳的飄落效果
this.xspeed = Math.sin(this.frame / 15) * 1.5;
</Direct Code>

name: 龍骨炮
note:
<Use Undertale Attack>
<UTB Mode: 0>
<UTB Duration: 600>

<UTB Initial Code>
// 戰鬥框設定為正方形，適合各方向躲避
this.window.width = 250;
this.window.height = 250;
this.window.x = (Graphics.width / 2) - (this.window.width / 2);
</UTB Initial Code>

<UTB Code>
// f = 當前幀數

// 每 15 幀（約 0.25 秒）就生成一發新的龍骨炮，節奏極快！
if (f > 20 && f % 15 === 0) {
    var blaster = this.createAttack(1);
    
    // 隨機決定這發炮的攻擊方式 (4 種模式隨機切換)
    var dir = Math.randomInt(4); 
    
    if (dir === 0) {
        // 【模式一】：垂直隨機位置
        blaster.x = this.window.left + Math.randomInt(this.window.width);
        blaster.y = this.window.y_middle;
        blaster.rotation = 0;
    } else if (dir === 1) {
        // 【模式二】：水平隨機位置
        blaster.x = this.window.x_middle;
        blaster.y = this.window.top + Math.randomInt(this.window.height);
        blaster.rotation = Math.PI / 2; 
    } else if (dir === 2) {
        // 【模式三】：精準狙擊玩家當前的 X 座標 (逼迫左右移動)
        blaster.x = this._player.x;
        blaster.y = this.window.y_middle;
        blaster.rotation = 0;
    } else {
        // 【模式四】：精準狙擊玩家當前的 Y 座標 (逼迫上下移動)
        blaster.x = this.window.x_middle;
        blaster.y = this._player.y;
        blaster.rotation = Math.PI / 2;
    }
}
</UTB Code>

<UTB Attack 1>
Initial X: this.window.x_middle
Initial Y: this.window.y_middle
Collision Type: rect
Width: 800
Height: 35
X Speed: 0
Y Speed: 0
Color: white
Warning: 25
<Direct Code>
// 【階段一：超短預警期】只有 25 幀 (不到 0.5 秒) 給玩家反應！
if (this.isWarning) {
    this.scale.y = 0.05; 
} 
// 【階段二與三：極速開火與消散】
else {
    if (!this.fireTimer) this.fireTimer = 0;
    this.fireTimer++;

    // 開火瞬間
    if (this.fireTimer === 1) {
        this.scale.y = 1.0;
        // 因為開炮頻率很高，把震動幅度調小一點，以免畫面晃到玩家想吐
        $gameScreen.startShake(3, 3, 5); 
    }

    // 只維持 8 幀的致命打擊，隨即進入消散期
    if (this.fireTimer > 8) {
        // 【殘影極速消失】縮小和透明化的速度調到極限
        this.scale.y -= 0.25;
        this.opacity -= 50;
        
        if (this.opacity <= 0 || this.scale.y <= 0) {
            this.delete();
        }
    }
}
</Direct Code>
</UTB Attack 1>
